reviews.comment:
Atención con desgano, la tele al mango con "música crstiana", la vendedora mandando mensajitos y escuchando audios. Muy flojo. El playero de 10

(Translated by Google)
Lackluster service, the TV blasting "Christian music," the saleswoman texting and listening to audiobooks. Very lame. The beach bar was a 10.

reviewReply.comment: estimado roberto gracias por comunicarlo ya se tomaron las medidas correspondiente para que no vuelva a suceder lo esperamos nuevamente

reviews.comment:
El baño sucio, inodoros tapados, mal olor, moscas.
Música cristiana a todo volumen en el salón.
La empleada del Servicompras con muy poca voluntad. Dejó bastante que desear.

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom was dirty, the toilets were clogged, there was a bad smell, and flies were everywhere.
Christian music was playing at full volume in the lounge.
The convenience store employee was very unhelpful. She left much to be desired.

reviewReply.comment: estimado cliente gracias por su comentario ya fue resuelto para que no vuelva a suceder la esperamos nuevamente

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWLXRISVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, todo organizado y limpio, tiene su local donde se puede tomar café, etc. Una ayuda verdadera para los que recorren la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, everything organized and clean, and they have a cafeteria where you can get coffee, etc. A real help for those traveling the route.
